## TaskQueryOptions.dueOrDeferWithin property

Duration string like `7d`<!-- -->/`1w` — matches tasks whose dueDate OR deferDate falls within `now..now+duration`<!-- -->. Used by `queryForecast` when `includeDeferred: true`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
dueOrDeferWithin?: string | undefined;
```
